title: STDIO, Streamable HTTP, Lifecycle, and Deployment · Threat Case: Lifecycle
summary: Choose and configure a transport for local and remote MCP servers. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext lifecycle increment in a local and remote transport deployment plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Handle startup, initialization, shutdown, timeout, and reconnect behavior.
Implement remote Streamable HTTP with correct routing, content types, and transport security.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Build Lifecycle evidence
